Noviora & Co.
The Essence of Pure Luxury
Brand Name
Noviora & Co. — "Novo" (new) + "Aurora" (radiance of dawn). Storytelling anchor: "A new light. A new scent. A new you." Consistent in every bio, subject line, and content footer.
Brand Line
"Where fragrance becomes heirloom" — discovered in the Poster image. Pairs perfectly with the original tagline. Use both interchangeably across platforms to test which resonates deeper with your audience.
Tagline
"The Essence of Pure Luxury" — embedded in all 6 images. Lead every bio, caption footer, and email with this line. It is your brand's signature in text form.
6 Editions
Forest (green/purple glow) · Gold (nugget gold) · Midnight Garden (dark botanical) · Indigo Clean (minimal) · Feature Map (education) · Golden Key (lifestyle romance). Each tells a different story of Noviora's world.
Tone of Voice
Intimate, poetic, confident. Write like someone whispering a precious secret. Never corporate. Never discounted. Every caption should feel worthy of the image that carries it.
Hashtag Home
#NovioraAndCo · #EssenceOfPureLuxury · #NovioraSotd · #FragranceHeirloom — own these from day one alongside #PerfumeOil #PerfumeTok #Perfumista #LuxuryFragrance
Product Features
🌸
Excellent Fragrance
A complex, layered scent profile — rich, warm, deeply memorable from first touch to dry-down.
⏱️
Long-Lasting
Oil bonds to skin chemistry for 8–12+ hours. Far longer than any alcohol spray on the market.
🤲
Skin-Friendly
Pure oil base — free from harsh alcohol. Gentle on all skin types. Nourishes as it scents.
👜
Portable & Convenient
30ml compact glass bottle with secure walnut cap. Pure luxury that travels with you everywhere.
All 6 Editions — Platform Strategy
Primary Hero ✦
Forest · Purple Glow · Enchanted
The Enchanted Forest
Most immersive image in the library. Use as Instagram grid hero, TikTok Reel cover, and Facebook cover photo. The glowing leaves and green oil create an otherworldly world — perfectly unique to Noviora.
Paid Ads ✦
Gold Nuggets · Bokeh · Warmth
The Gold Reserve
Warmth, gold, abundance — this is your highest-converting ad creative. Use for paid Facebook/Instagram ads, Pinterest hero pins, and gifting campaigns. The gold nuggets communicate value viscerally.
Mood Content ✦
Dark Botanical · Indigo Drama
The Midnight Garden
Dark, dramatic, deeply sensory. Use for Instagram grid texture variety, moody evening Reel covers, and Pinterest dark aesthetic boards. Pairs perfectly with the "Indigo Hour" caption from the caption bank.
Email / Blog ✦
White Background · Clean Indigo
The Minimal Indigo
Clean white background with the striking blue oil. Best for email headers, blog featured images, and A/B ad testing. Light backgrounds often outperform dark for click-through rates — test this vs Gold Reserve.
Education ✦
Green Feature Map · Bold Type
The Feature Edition
All 4 USPs visualised with bold typography — "Where fragrance becomes heirloom." Use as Facebook pinned post, educational Instagram carousel slide 1, and the first email you send to new subscribers.
Lifestyle ✦
Linen · Rose Petal · Golden Key
The Golden Key
Rose petals, a golden key, soft linen and marble — this image unlocks brand story and romance content. Perfect for gifting season campaigns, Pinterest mood boards, and Instagram "brand soul" posts.
Noviora Image Rotation Rule: Never use the same edition twice in a row. Dark drama (Forest / Midnight Garden) → Warmth & gold → Clean / Minimal → Education → Lifestyle → Repeat. Keep the grid mood balanced — mysterious, aspirational, intimate, and educational all in one scroll.
The 5 Content Pillars
Every Noviora post maps to one of these five pillars. Each pillar has been assigned to its strongest edition image for visual coherence.
01
🌿
Scent Storytelling
Give each oil a world. The Forest edition opens with moss-covered stone; the Midnight Garden whispers indigo secrets. Write like the scent itself is the narrator — let each edition speak in its own voice.
Mood FilmsPoetic CaptionsOil PortraitsScent Diaries
02
🌹
Luxury Ritual
Noviora belongs in life's most precious moments. Golden Key for romantic and gifting content. Gold Reserve for occasions and celebration. Minimal Indigo for calm morning rituals and daily luxury routines.
Application RitualsGRWMGiftingDay-in-Life
03
✦
Expertise
The Feature Edition anchors all education. Each of the 4 USPs — excellent fragrance, long-lasting, skin-friendly, portable — gives you one standalone post. Four posts from one hero image, four weeks of expert content.
Oil vs SprayLong-LastingSkin-FriendlyApplication Tips
04
👥
Community
The #NovioraSotd movement. Invite followers to choose their edition — Forest, Gold, or Indigo — and recreate the mood. The Gold Reserve and Forest are the most shareable for fragrance reviewers and collectors.
UGC RepostsSOTD SeriesCustomer StoriesEdition Polls
05
🏺
Brand Soul
Your 6 editions tell the full Noviora universe — from ancient forest to pure gold. Use them as chapters in a brand origin carousel or Reel sequence. "Where fragrance becomes heirloom" — tell that story visually.
Founder StoryThe CollectionsBrand ValuesBehind Scenes
Edition-to-Pillar Mapping: Forest & Midnight Garden → Scent Storytelling · Gold Reserve → Luxury Ritual · Feature Edition → Expertise · Golden Key → Community & Gifting · Minimal Indigo → Email/Blog · All 6 → Brand Soul carousel
Noviora Caption Bank
10 ready-to-post captions in Noviora's intimate, poetic brand voice. Each paired with the edition it was written for. One click to copy with branded hashtags.
✦Each caption is crafted in Noviora's intimate, poetic voice with platform-specific hashtags. The voice is always: warm, mysterious, confident — never loud. Click Copy Caption to paste directly into any platform.
Editorial Calendar
Three months of Noviora content — week by week. Desire → Authority → Devotion. Use the arrow buttons to navigate between months.

Channel Strategy
Where Noviora must show up, how often, and which of the 6 editions to prioritise per platform.
📸
Instagram
Lead with Forest Edition as grid hero. Rotate all 6 editions — never repeat the same in a row. Reels: Forest and Midnight Garden as covers. Stories: Minimal Indigo and Golden Key. Grid: balance dark (Forest/Garden), warm (Gold), and clean (Indigo) moods.
5–7× / week
Hero
🎵
TikTok / #PerfumeTok
Forest Edition is your TikTok cover — the glowing leaves stop every scroll instantly. Post SOTD videos, oil vs spray tests, and "which edition are you?" content. The Midnight Garden is perfect for late-night atmospheric storytelling Reels on #PerfumeTok.
4–6× / week
Hero
📘
Facebook
Feature Edition as pinned post — clear product benefits, bold type. Gold Reserve for weekend aspirational content. Golden Key and Minimal Indigo for weekday story posts. Facebook audiences respond strongly to value propositions — lead with USPs here.
4–5× / week
Hero
📌
Pinterest
Gold Reserve is your Pinterest hero — warm, aspirational, tall. Create boards: "Noviora Forest Collection", "Gold Fragrance Luxury", "Indigo Nights". All 6 editions pin perfectly in vertical format. The Forest and Midnight Garden are especially well-suited for Pinterest's dark-aesthetic boards.
10–15 pins / week
Core
📧
Email Newsletter
Minimal Indigo as email header — clean white background renders perfectly across all email clients. Feature Edition as educational email insert. Golden Key for gifting season. Write like a personal letter — never a promotion. Intimate, exclusive, and brief.
1–2× / week
Core
📝
Blog / SEO
Target keywords: "best perfume oil for men", "long lasting perfume oil", "luxury fragrance oil UK". Minimal Indigo for blog thumbnails (clean white performs best in Google Image). Forest and Midnight Garden for dark-aesthetic fragrance editorial content and brand storytelling articles.
2–4× / month
Supporting
🤝
Influencer Partnerships
Send all 6 editions to influencer partners. The editorial quality — especially Forest and Gold — elevates their content dramatically. Forest Edition is particularly shareable for fragrance reviewers and dark-aesthetic creators who want to tell a story, not just show a bottle.
2–4 collabs / month
Supporting
